name: trg_fx_rates_daily
description: Daily trigger to pull NBH (Magyar Nemzeti Bank) FX rates at 09:00 CET (after MNB publishes daily rates). Populates config.ref_fx_rates for same-day use by dbt FX conversion models.

properties.description: Daily MNB FX rate ingestion — fires at 09:05 CET every weekday. MNB publishes rates at ~09:00. Weekend rates are not published; the pipeline handles this by carrying forward Friday closing rates.
